notes: HAR-690 captures giftCardCredit/giftCardDebit validation branches for expired, deactivated, mismatched currency, future processedAt, pre-epoch processedAt, and typed success payload behavior.
Setup creates three disposable gift cards: active, expired, and deactivated. Cleanup deactivates any setup cards that are not already deactivated.

active.label: active

expired.label: expired

deactivated.label: deactivated

deactivate.label: setupDeactivate

expiredCredit.label: expiredCredit

deactivatedCredit.label: deactivatedCredit

mismatchCredit.label: mismatchCredit

userErrors.message: The currency provided does not match the currency of the gift card.

futureCredit.label: futureCredit

userErrors.message: The processed date must not be in the future.

preEpochCredit.label: preEpochCredit

userErrors.message: A valid processed date must be used.

deactivatedDebit.label: deactivatedDebit
